intro.speaker: professor
intro.text: Hello, how can I help you?

intro.speaker: Player
intro.text: Hello, I'm here to become the best trainer in this town.

intro.speaker: Player
intro.text: I would like to know if you could help me on this quest?

intro.speaker: professor
intro.text: Of course, but first, what is your name?

intro.speaker: Player
intro.text: My name is Sacha, and yours?

intro.speaker: professor
intro.text: My name is Chen. To help you on this quest, I offer you a small gift (x30 Poké Balls)

intro.speaker: Player
intro.text: Thank you, but where can I find my first Pokémon?

intro.speaker: professor
intro.text: To the east of here, there is a portal that will take you into the Pokémon world.

intro.speaker: professor
intro.text: But I have something even better to offer you!

intro.speaker: professor
intro.text: I'll let you choose one of these Pokémon!

intro.speaker: Player
intro.text: Ohh, I'm going to choose Pikachu! Thank you for this gift!

response.speaker: professor
response.text: You can go to the farmland east of the map to find Pokémon.

firstPokemon.speaker: professor
firstPokemon.text: Hello, how have things been since the last time?

firstPokemon.speaker: Player
firstPokemon.text: Very good, thanks for the Poké Balls!
